danger_signals.visual_form: Unit sprites moving toward player structures; radar blips on minimap
danger_signals.meaning: Imminent threat to base or units; requires immediate defense response

danger_signals.visual_form: Power plant building flashing or smoking; power bar depleting on HUD
danger_signals.meaning: Base power grid failing; defensive structures losing functionality

danger_signals.visual_form: Electric blue arcing animation between coil and target; distinctive sound effect
danger_signals.meaning: High-damage area defense active; extreme threat to approaching armor

danger_signals.visual_form: Multiple enemy units clustered near player structures; smoke/explosions
danger_signals.meaning: Critical combat situation requiring immediate reinforcement or retreat

danger_signals.visual_form: Ore fields visibly shrinking on map; ore trucks traveling longer distances
danger_signals.meaning: Resource scarcity; economic pressure and reduced production capacity

safety_signals.visual_form: Structures glowing with full brightness; radar operational; defensive towers standing
safety_signals.meaning: Base defense systems online; safe to expand or attack

safety_signals.visual_form: Green/yellow ore deposits visible on terrain near base
safety_signals.meaning: Economic security; sustainable resource generation available

safety_signals.visual_form: Multiple units clustered and stationary near base
safety_signals.meaning: Force concentration for defense; readiness against attacks

safety_signals.visual_form: Minimap showing no enemy dots in visible range
safety_signals.meaning: No immediate enemy contact; temporary safety window for operations

safety_signals.visual_form: Structure fully constructed with steady glow; green outline disappears
safety_signals.meaning: New capability online; base expansion successful

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Allied structures have sleek, angular design; rounded turrets on defensive towers
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Radar Dome (unique to Allies); Medium Tank (blue-grey armor); Gun Turret (pointed tower design); naval destroyers and gunboats

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Hammer and sickle aesthetic; blocky, industrial design
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Soviet structures are more massive and imposing; boxy silhouettes; Tesla Coil distinctive blue electric design
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Tesla Coil (unique Soviet structure with electrical arcs); Mammoth Tank (oversized red armor); Flame Tower (distinctive flamethrower turret); submarines and MiG aircraft

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Ore fields densely packed across map; player base small but expandable; enemy base distant
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Players focus on ore harvesting and basic structure construction; limited military presence; defensive posture

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Ore fields thinning; multiple ore refineries visible; both factions expanding simultaneously; terrain showing base construction activity
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Increased unit production; first skirmishes at ore field boundaries; power plant and silo construction accelerates

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Ore fields nearly depleted or gone; ore silos expanding; bases occupying more map territory; visual congestion of structures
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Large-scale military operations; ore denial strategies; aggressive expansion toward remaining gems; defensive consolidation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Power plants visibly damaged or missing; structures dimming or flickering; critical buildings losing glow
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Defensive structures ceasing operation; radar going offline; forced idle time for production; vulnerability window

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: One faction's colors dominating large map areas; opponent structures destroyed and rubble visible; victor's units moving freely
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Aggressive pushes into enemy territory; less concern for defense; expansion accelerates; opponent retreats or fortifies

environmental_storytelling.example: Allied structures use angular, efficient designs reflecting Western engineering; Soviet structures are heavily armored and imposing, reflecting military-industrial aesthetic
Tesla Coils (Soviet-only) create visually distinctive blue electric arcs; Gun Turrets (Allied) have pointed design—instantly identifying faction control of territory
Ore field visual depletion over time shows economic pressure; terrain changes reveal which side exploited resources more aggressively
Placement of power plants, refineries, and defensive structures reveals opponent's tactical philosophy (aggressive expansion vs. defensive consolidation)
Destroyed structures and debris in contested areas communicate where combat occurred and which faction currently holds ground

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Moves repeatedly between ore field and refinery; visual loop indicates active economy
Stationary near refinery; indicates ore scarcity or refinery full; economic stress signal
Clusters around target; visible damage effects on building; indicates siege or critical assault
Multiple tanks grouped; slow movement toward objective; indicates coordinated push
Invisible on map except radar blip; appears as threat only on surface when attacking
Visual flickering; audible distress sounds; nearby structures lose functionality; cascading failure indicator
Fast fly-by with payload release; brief vulnerability window; hit-and-run tactical signature
Hovering and rotating; sustained fire output; armored appearance allows longer engagement

notes: Red Alert uses asymmetric faction design where visual differentiation and unique unit characteristics create distinct strategic identities. Soviet superiority in ground/defensive capabilities is communicated through Tesla Coil's distinctive electric visual and Mammoth Tank's imposing size. Allied strength in naval and air is shown through destroyer/gunboat designs and MiG aircraft. Power system serves as critical world-state indicator—visible power bars and structure dimming create constant tension and resource management feedback. Ore depletion is explicitly visual, changing landscape and creating economic narrative. The game communicates political opposition through stark color contrast (blue vs. red) and fundamentally different architectural styles.
